infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Your location is used to determine your position during an emergency and find the nearest help.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Background location is used to update your position if an emergency alert is queued while offline.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow ER SDK to access your location for emergency response.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow ER SDK to access your location to find your position in an emergency.
